title: botrychium montanum
intro: Botrychium montanum, also known as the mountain grape fern or rattlesnake fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Botrychium. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Botrychium montanum include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including skin irritations, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
